AGENCY OUTREACH EMAIL SCRIPT #2 — voicemail follow-up email to an agency contact (template)

"Tony, Just finished leaving a message on your VM. XYZ LLC is an SBA 8(a) certified construction firm with $15 million in bonding.

Our team has more than 30 years of construction experience under our belt. We have a full-time staff of administrators, project managers and superintendents.

We are actively pursuing projects in the Northeast region; CT, NH, MA, RI and would like the chance to work with FAA.

I would love the opportunity to set up a teleconference to discuss our firm's capabilities.

I have attached our company's capabilities statement to this email.

v/r,"

Teaching point: pair the call with an email — reference the voicemail you just left, restate certification + bonding in one line, name the specific region/states you pursue and the agency you want to work with, ask for a teleconference, and attach the capability statement.
